---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Use Case

Describe the problem this feature would solve or the workflow it would improve.

**Example:**
> I want to fuse radar and LiDAR point clouds together before running the vision model to improve detection accuracy.

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this feature working.

**Example:**
> Add a `--multi-pcd` flag to merge radar and LiDAR point clouds before projection onto the camera mask.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds?

## Impact

Who would benefit from this feature?
- [ ] Edge AI developers
- [ ] ROS2 users
- [ ] Embedded system integrators
- [ ] Sensor fusion researchers
- [ ] Other: ___________

## Hardware Considerations

Does this feature depend on specific hardware?
- [ ] Works on all platforms (x86_64, ARM64)
- [ ] Requires specific hardware: ___________
- [ ] Requires NPU/GPU acceleration
- [ ] Requires specific sensor hardware

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or examples.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues/PRs for similar requests
- [ ] I have described the use case clearly
- [ ] I have considered backward compatibility
- [ ] I am willing to contribute a PR for this feature
